title: Optimized for low-latency workloads, Mistral Small now available in Amazon Bedrock
description: Mistral Small, an efficient large language model, joins Amazon Bedrock's lineup, excelling in low-latency tasks, multilingual support, and coding prowess while maintaining cost-effectiveness.
creator: Esra Kayabali
